title: Network ACL + API Gateway Security — Integration Test Coverage Gaps
description: test_network_access_control_engine.py, test_api_gateway_security_engine.py, and test_api_abuse_detection_engine.py provide 57-65 tests each but they are unit tests against the SQLite CRUD layer. The test_security_health_engine.py community anchor exposes that health checks are registered but never actually executed against live services. No integration tests verify that NAC posture scores drive real firewall policy changes.
missing: Integration test harness: spin up a local FastAPI app and verify NAC posture check results change the allow/quarantine decision on simulated devices
Security health check executor: implement a scheduler that runs registered checks against live endpoints and writes pass/fail results to the health DB
API abuse detection live mode: wire the abuse detection engine to RASP middleware so flagged endpoints get automatic rate-limit rule injection
